title: Prioritize
scope: Per-user focus: up to 3 active priority slots, plus a backlog aggregator that combines goals, reminders, schedules, to-do items, and any other app-package provider into one ranked list. A required core app surfacing 'show my priorities'. NOT the source of the underlying items (each owning app is) — Prioritize ranks and focuses them.

specs.title: Show focus
specs.behavior: Showing focus returns the user's current priority slots (at most 3 active).

specs.title: Promote to focus
specs.behavior: Promoting moves a backlog item (by its source type + id) into the next available focus slot 1–3.

specs.title: Clear a focus item
specs.behavior: Clearing removes an item from focus by its source id.

specs.title: Family focus
specs.behavior: Family focus shows every household member's current priorities together.

specs.title: Backlog summary
specs.behavior: The backlog summary aggregates actionable items across goals, reminders, schedules, to-dos, and any other registered provider into one ranked list.
